shows.name: a little bit of everything
shows.desc: with so many genres of music spanning the universe of sound itself, it can be difficult to figure out what to listen to, or even where to start. 'a little bit of everything' is just as the title describes - a small taste in a variety of genres. who knows what you'll listen to next?

shows.name: The Spice Cabinet
shows.desc: The Spice Cabinet is a show where we will be freestyling, making beats, reviewing artists/music/genres and so much more while interacting with guests and the audience at the same time.

shows.name: Camp Night with Bear Dentist
shows.desc: Camp Night is a sunset show, presenting comfy music to ease your afternoons and nights. Fuzzy indie music, ambient electronic, and all other kinds of hopeful music - set up a shortwave radio and watch the sky turn orange.
